Babygirl (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,175,128Details
International Box Office $35,570,441
Worldwide Box Office $63,745,569
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,490,145 (15.9% of total gross)
Legs:6.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,115 opening theaters/2,164 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,703,083

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2024 (Wide) by A24

(Rating bulletin 2853 (cert #55114), 9/25/2024)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Film festival: Venice Film Festival 2024
